settings.starterPrompt:
重点方向：都市为主，奇幻为辅
体型下限：非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性，不要只是普通运动型
极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖和斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿，圆润但有压重力量
如果用户要更壮，要写成比参考图更大、更厚、更有力量的巨型力量感体格
生成服装前先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭
白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣，要读出胸肩和手臂体积
如果用户说脱掉外套，就不要再补回夹克、外套、背心、开襟衬衫或其他上身外层
现实职业或社会角色作为基底
一个清晰的核心设计：招牌装备、异能、魔法道具或隐藏身份
现代服装与轻量奇幻细节结合，服装必须好看而不只是实用
用数值、世界阵营、战斗方式、身体轮廓和反重复交换来决定服装
京都动画式清爽线条
干净赛璐璐阴影，阴影概括明确
整体干净、无灰尘、主动降噪
颜色清透，角色轮廓易读

默认禁止：少女
萝莉
萌系
偶像风、女性化男性
瘦弱体型
普通运动型体格
修长纤细男主
写实肌肉渲染
照片感
湿身效果
写实布料纹理、写实材质反光、时装摄影语言
油亮皮革、湿身材质、拟真塑料或乳胶感
工业风作为主设计
大量灰尘、油污、铁锈、脏污质感
废土、煤灰、混浊阴影

generationProfile.notes:
【生图读取规则】
全身图生成时，只读取【提示词】模块里的最终提示词和已上传的风格参考图。
不直接读取身份、特征、服装、人格、数值等零散字段。
这些字段只用于先生成最终提示词，不会再被追加到生图提示里。

1. 最终提示词
- 必须明确写成：单个人物、全身立绘、头到脚完整可见。
- 要把角色的身份、身形、脸部、发型、服装、工具或武器转成可视化描述。
- 默认写成现代都市角色，用一个招牌装备、异能、魔法道具或隐藏身份做核心设计钩子。
- 武器生成必须先决定战斗原型，再决定武器来源，最后才读取职业元素进行包装；禁止直接把职业常见工具当成最终武器。
- 如果职业暗示了扳手、菜刀、书本、手术刀等直译工具，先写入禁用直译，再通过结构、尺度、功能、媒介或伪装至少变形一次。
- 战斗字段填写顺序：战斗原型 -> 武器来源 -> 禁用直译 -> 变形逻辑 -> 最终武器。
- 默认体型下限是非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂和强壮大腿，不是修长瘦男主，也不是普通运动型。
- 写服装字段前必须先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭，不把它当成固定服装库。
- 白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣；要用干净赛璐璐阴影读出胸肩手臂体积，不要湿身或写实肌肉。
- 如果用户说脱掉外套，最终提示词要明确禁止 jacket/coat/vest/open shirt/overshirt，让紧身白色上衣成为上身主视觉。
- 材质用干净动画设计语言：平面色块、概括褶皱、简化金属小点缀；不要写实布料纹理、油亮反光或时装摄影语言。
- 画风要明确写成京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐：线条干净流畅，阴影块面概括，整体干净无灰尘。
- 英文提示词作为生图主文本，中文作为理解备份。
- 最终提示词不要写角色名字、代号、别名或罗马音；用年龄、血统、职业、体型、脸、服装、道具和奇幻标记描述可视内容。

2. 风格参考图
- 只参考体型比例、线条、上色和画风。
- 不复制参考图的角色身份、脸、衣服、道具、姿势和配色。

3. 禁止内容
- 不要 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字标签、页面截图、多人组图。
- 不要把生成配置或属性列表做成画面内容。
- 不要把工业感、脏污、灰尘、油污、铁锈或废土纹理当成主要设计主张。

metaDesign.characterHook: 一个听得懂旧港管道声音的检修员，总能在事故发生前半拍出现在阀门旁。
metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Lanfasi Zhou, a 34-year-old harbor pressure-valve repairman. Apply COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md costume judgment: keep the outfit attractive, clean, anime-stylized, and varied from the old short-jacket utility-pants template. He is a tall, sturdy adult male with broad shoulders, thick chest, practical worker strength, warm wheat skin, a long rectangular face, narrow light-amber eyes, calm slightly smiling expression, slicked-back short dark brown-black hair with copper-brown highlights, and a short scar on his left jaw. Outfit: a clean white fitted tank top tucked into high-waist wide-pleated inspection trousers, an open deep teal-gray short-sleeve inspection shirt with rolled sleeves and a small white valve-bureau embroidery on the chest, a diagonal chest instrument strap connected to a narrow tool belt, low-cut black-blue anti-slip inspection shoes, one thin repair glove, and a white wrist wrap on the other hand. A small old copper whistle necklace sits close to the collar. Props: a valve wrench and a small pressure gauge, clearly readable as harbor pipe-network maintenance tools. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained white scale marks on the pressure gauge and chest embroidery, low glow, compact and tidy. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：岚阀司昼，34岁男性，港区压力阀检修员。高挑结实，宽肩厚胸，暖麦色皮肤，长方脸，细长浅琥珀眼，平静带笑，后梳短发带铜棕挑染，左下颌短疤。服装根据 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md 判断：白色贴身背心扎进高腰宽褶检修长裤，外搭开襟深青灰短袖检修衬衫，袖口卷起，胸前有小型阀门局白线刺绣；胸前斜背仪表带连接窄工具腰带，低筒防滑检修鞋，单侧薄检修手套，另一只手缠白色腕带，细链铜哨贴在领口内侧。手持阀门扳手和小压力表，幻想锚点只在压力表白色刻度和胸前刺绣上出现少量低光。材质是干净动画色块和概括褶皱，不要写实布料纹理或油亮反光。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到脚完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of a 36-year-old Chinese male urban bridge expansion-joint temperature inspector. Do not include any name text. Body: very bulky muscular adult male, extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick arms, strong thighs, warm wheat skin, square-long face, short slicked-back black hair with a few warm brown tips, a short shallow scar above the right eyebrow, faint jaw stubble. Expression: protective low-command expression, mouth slightly open as if warning people to step back, brows gently lowered, deep brown eyes alert and facing forward. Outfit: clean white fitted long-sleeve performance top tucked into the waist, visibly stretched around chest, shoulders, and arms with clean cel-shaded folds; open sleeveless short bridge-service temperature-control vest in warm gray and graphite black, stiff silver-white reflective shoulder edging, no large back text; high-waist straight work trousers in dark red-brown with black-gray panels and folded knee guards; heavy graphite-black short anti-slip bridge boots; one black-gray half-palm temperature glove on the right hand, white wrist wrap on the left; narrow tool belt plus diagonal chest strap carrying a small thermometer case and numbered clasp. Props: a short-handled bridge-gap shield and a folding temperature marker board, readable as compact bridge maintenance equipment, graphite black and warm gray structure with only small amber-orange scale marks as restrained low glow. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, attractive urban-fantasy workwear, clean color blocks, simplified metal accents. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no watermark, no photoreal fabric grain, no wet material, no glossy leather, no gritty dirt, no rust. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：36岁中国男性，城市桥梁伸缩缝温控巡检员。非常魁梧的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗壮手臂和强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，方长脸，黑色短寸后梳，发梢少量暖棕挑染，右眉上方短浅疤，淡短胡茬。表情是保护性低声指令：嘴微张像在提醒路人后退，眉峰轻压，深茶色眼睛警觉向前。服装：白色贴身长袖功能上衣扎进裤腰，胸肩和手臂被干净赛璐璐褶皱撑起；外穿无袖短款桥务温控马甲，前襟敞开，暖灰与石墨黑，肩部有硬挺银白反光边；高腰暗赤褐直筒桥务工装裤，膝侧折叠护片，重底石墨黑短筒防滑靴；右手黑灰半掌测温手套，左手白色腕带，窄工具腰带和斜跨胸带挂小温度计盒。道具：短柄桥缝护盾与折叠测温牌，石墨黑和暖灰结构，只有琥珀橙刻度低光作为幻想锚点。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，单人站姿，全身从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。不要文字、标签、界面、图表、角色设定页、场景、阴影、地面或第二个人物。不要在角色身上使用 #00ff00 或近似绿色。

generationProfile.notes:
【生图读取规则】
全身图生成时，只读取【提示词】模块里的最终提示词和已上传的风格参考图。
不直接读取身份、特征、服装、人格、数值等零散字段。
这些字段只用于先生成最终提示词，不会再被追加到生图提示里。

1. 最终提示词
- 必须明确写成：单个人物、全身立绘、头到脚完整可见。
- 要把角色的身份、身形、脸部、发型、服装、工具或武器转成可视化描述。
- 默认写成现代都市角色，用一个招牌装备、异能、魔法道具或隐藏身份做核心设计钩子。
- 武器生成必须先决定战斗原型，再决定武器来源，最后才读取职业元素进行包装；禁止直接把职业常见工具当成最终武器。
- 如果职业暗示了扳手、菜刀、书本、手术刀等直译工具，先写入禁用直译，再通过结构、尺度、功能、媒介或伪装至少变形一次。
- 战斗字段填写顺序：战斗原型 -> 武器来源 -> 禁用直译 -> 变形逻辑 -> 最终武器。
- 默认体型下限是非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂和强壮大腿，不是修长瘦男主，也不是普通运动型。
- 写服装字段前必须先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭，不把它当成固定服装库。
- 白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣；要用干净赛璐璐阴影读出胸肩手臂体积，不要湿身或写实肌肉。
- 如果用户说脱掉外套，最终提示词要明确禁止 jacket/coat/vest/open shirt/overshirt，让紧身白色上衣成为上身主视觉。
- 材质用干净动画设计语言：平面色块、概括褶皱、简化金属小点缀；不要写实布料纹理、油亮反光或时装摄影语言。
- 画风要明确写成京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐：线条干净流畅，阴影块面概括，整体干净无灰尘。
- 英文提示词作为生图主文本，中文作为理解备份。
- 最终提示词不要写角色名字、代号、别名或罗马音；用年龄、血统、职业、体型、脸、服装、道具和奇幻标记描述可视内容。

2. 风格参考图
- 只参考体型比例、线条、上色和画风。
- 不复制参考图的角色身份、脸、衣服、道具、姿势和配色。

3. 禁止内容
- 不要 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字标签、页面截图、多人组图。
- 不要把生成配置或属性列表做成画面内容。
- 不要把工业感、脏污、灰尘、油污、铁锈或废土纹理当成主要设计主张。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of a 38-year-old pure Japanese male Showa-era sign lightbox restoration craftsman from an old Tokyo shopping street. He is tall and sturdy with very broad shoulders, thick chest, strong arms, warm light wheat Japanese skin tone, a long square face, narrow black-brown eyes, a calm short toothy smile, slightly raised brow peak as if checking the brightness of a light tube, slicked-back short jet-black hair with neat sideburns, a faint scratch on the right side of the nose bridge, and neatly trimmed short stubble on the chin and upper lip. Outfit: no outerwear, no jacket, no coat, no vest, no kimono robe, no cardigan, no overshirt. A clean white fitted short-sleeve crew-neck top tucked into high-waist deep ink-blue straight work trousers, charcoal-black and ink-blue suspenders connected to a narrow tool belt, small vermilion sealing tags along the suspender edges, one black-gray half-finger electrician glove, white cut-resistant tape wrapped around the other hand, low-cut black anti-slip work shoes with old brass buckles. A short cord old brass lamp-socket pendant sits close to the collar. Props: an unfolded folding Showa sign lightbox frame, clearly readable as a sturdy rectangular frame, with a slim milky-white light tube case fixed beside it. Colors: old brass, milky-white lampshade, small vermilion sealing tags, restrained warm-white low glow. Fantasy anchor: only tiny warm-white low-glow marks on the sealing tags and light tube edge; compact and tidy, no large aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no gritty grime. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset, modern urban fantasy with realistic Japanese street craftsman identity first. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green anywhere on the character, props, glow, reflections, or shadows.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：38岁纯血日本男性，东京旧商店街昭和招牌灯箱修复师。高大结实，宽肩厚胸，偏暖浅麦色日本肤色，偏长方脸，黑褐细长眼，沉着露齿短笑，眉峰轻挑，像在确认灯管亮度；乌黑短发后梳，鬓角整齐，鼻梁右侧浅划痕，下巴与上唇有修整短胡茬。服装：无外套，无夹克、和服外披、马甲、长外套和开衫；白色贴身短袖圆领上衣扎进高腰墨蓝直筒工装裤，炭黑与墨蓝拼接背带连接窄工具腰带，背带边缘有小块朱红封签，半指黑灰电工手套，另一手缠白色防割胶带，低筒黑色防滑工作鞋带旧黄铜小扣。短绳旧黄铜小灯座坠饰贴近领口。手持展开的折叠式昭和灯箱框，像坚固矩形框架，旁边固定细长乳白灯管套；道具颜色为旧黄铜、乳白灯罩、朱红封签、暖白低光。幻想锚点克制：只在灯箱框封签和灯管边缘有少量暖白低光，不要大面积光效。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，现代都市奇幻但现实日本街区手艺人优先。单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，无阴影、无地面、无文字、无 UI、无角色表。不要在人物、道具或光效里使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

- 武器生成必须先决定战斗原型，再决定武器来源，最后才读取职业元素进行包装；禁止直接把职业常见工具当成最终武器。
- 如果职业暗示了扳手、菜刀、书本、手术刀等直译工具，先写入禁用直译，再通过结构、尺度、功能、媒介或伪装至少变形一次。
- 战斗字段填写顺序：战斗原型 -> 武器来源 -> 禁用直译 -> 变形逻辑 -> 最终武器。
- 默认体型下限是非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂和强壮大腿，不是修长瘦男主，也不是普通运动型。
- 写服装字段前必须先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭，不把它当成固定服装库。
- 白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣；要用干净赛璐璐阴影读出胸肩手臂体积，不要湿身或写实肌肉。
- 如果用户说脱掉外套，最终提示词要明确禁止 jacket/coat/vest/open shirt/overshirt，让紧身白色上衣成为上身主视觉。
- 材质用干净动画设计语言：平面色块、概括褶皱、简化金属小点缀；不要写实布料纹理、油亮反光或时装摄影语言。
- 画风要明确写成京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐：线条干净流畅，阴影块面概括，整体干净无灰尘。
- 英文提示词作为生图主文本，中文作为理解备份。
- 最终提示词不要写角色名字、代号、别名或罗马音；用年龄、血统、职业、体型、脸、服装、道具和奇幻标记描述可视内容。

2. 风格参考图
- 只参考体型比例、线条、上色和画风。
- 不复制参考图的角色身份、脸、衣服、道具、姿势和配色。

3. 禁止内容
- 不要 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字标签、页面截图、多人组图。
- 不要把生成配置或属性列表做成画面内容。
- 不要把工业感、脏污、灰尘、油污、铁锈或废土纹理当成主要设计主张。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of a 36-year-old male subway night-shift clock calibrator. He is tall and heavily built with very broad shoulders, thick chest, strong forearms, warm beige-brown skin, a long square face, narrow dark tea-brown eyes, a focused gentle expression with lips slightly open as if giving a short warning, lightly pressed brows as if listening for a distant bell, side-parted slicked-back short black-brown hair with subtle dark golden-brown highlights, a faint scar at the right eyebrow tail, and clean faint stubble. Outfit: no outerwear, no jacket, no coat, no vest, no cape, no overshirt. A clean white fitted long-sleeve knit top tucked into high-waist coal-black work trousers, deep indigo work suspenders connected to a narrow tool belt, fine red calibration lines along the suspender edges, half-finger calibration gloves, low-cut black hard-sole patrol shoes with small brass buckles. A short-chain old brass pocket watch sits half-open on the chest. Props: an unfolded folding second-hand ruler, clearly readable as a physical short baton-measuring ruler hybrid, plus the brass pocket watch with an ivory dial. Fantasy anchor: only tiny warm-white low-glow marks along the watch scale and ruler edge; restrained, compact, tidy, no large aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no gritty grime. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset, modern urban fantasy with the real-world transit maintenance role first. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green anywhere on the character, props, glow, reflections, or shadows.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：36岁男性，地铁夜班校钟员。高大厚实，宽肩厚胸，暖米棕皮肤，方长脸，狭长深茶褐眼，温和专注地半开口提醒，眉心轻压，像在听远处钟声；偏分后梳黑褐短发带暗金棕细挑染，右眉尾浅疤，干净胡青。服装：无外套，无夹克、风衣、马甲、披肩；白色贴身长袖针织上衣扎进高腰煤灰黑工装长裤，深靛蓝工装背带连接窄工具腰带，背带边缘有细红校准线，半指校准手套，低筒黑色硬底巡检鞋，黄铜色小扣。胸口短链黄铜怀表半开，手持展开的折叠秒针尺，像短棍与量尺结合，表盘象牙白，只有极少红色校准线和旧铜高光。幻想锚点克制：怀表刻度与秒针尺边缘有细小暖白低光，不要大面积光效。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，强可读轮廓，现代都市奇幻但现实职业优先。单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，无阴影、无地面、无文字、无 UI、无角色表。不要在人物、道具或光效里使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of a 29-year-old East Asian male planetarium dome projection operator for the North City Planetarium. He has a very bulky muscular adult male power build: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, huge upper arms, thick forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded mass. Warm wheat skin, wide rectangular face with a strong jaw, one tiny beauty mark on the left cheekbone, deep amber-brown rounded narrow eyes, thick straight brows slightly raised; fluffy short dark chestnut-black hair with a few star-gold highlights at the tips, short stubble. Bright docent expression: thick lips slightly open as if explaining constellation positions, brows and eyes lifted with clear friendly energy. Outfit: a clean white fitted short-sleeve shirt tucked into high-waist trousers, visibly stretched across chest, shoulders, and arms; a long deep-indigo planetarium uniform vest worn open at the front down to the waist, knee-length with high side slits, not covering the white shirt; high-waist charcoal wide-leg docent uniform trousers with crisp trouser lines; thick-soled black quiet indoor shoes. Accessories: white half-palm focusing gloves, narrow waist cinch connected to a side film canister and astrolabe hook, small silver dome-key pendant necklace. Visible weapon object: a folding astrolabe lantern umbrella held in one hand, the canopy readable as a physical star-map disk and projection-lens mechanism that can unfold into a protective screen; a side film canister links to the umbrella with a few restrained low-glow star-gold orbital lines. Fantasy anchor: only a few subtle low-glow star-gold pinholes, short orbital tracks, and warm-silver lens edges, no strong diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal buckles and lens rims; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no grimy industrial texture. Style: clean Kyoto Animation-like TV anime game character concept art, crisp readable outline, tidy cel shading, fresh colors, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：29岁东亚男性，北城星象馆的天文馆穹幕放映员。非常厚实的巨型力量体格，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子和斜方肌、巨大上臂与粗前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，下颌厚实，左颧一颗小浅痣，深邃圆狭的深琥珀棕眼，浓平眉略抬；蓬松深栗黑短发，发尾少量星金挑染，短胡茬。表情是开朗讲解式微笑：厚唇微张像正在讲解星座位置，眉眼明亮上扬。服装：白色贴身短袖上衣扎进高腰裤，胸肩和手臂被明显撑紧；外层是深靛长马甲式穹幕制服，前襟敞开到腰侧，长度过膝但两侧高开衩，不遮住白色上衣主体；高腰炭黑宽腿讲解制服裤，裤线利落，厚底黑色静音馆内鞋。配件：半掌白色调焦手套，窄腰封连接腰侧胶片匣和星盘挂扣，细链小型穹幕钥片。手持折叠星盘灯伞，伞面像星盘与投影镜片组合，能展开成可见的护幕实体道具；腰侧胶片匣与灯伞之间有少量低亮星金星轨线。幻想锚点：只有少量低亮星金星孔、短星轨和暖银镜片边，不要强烈大面积发光。材质是干净动画色块、简化褶皱、少量图形化金属扣和镜片边，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或脏污工业质感。干净京都动画式 TV 动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简洁赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，完全均匀，无渐变、无阴影、无地面、无反射、无场景。绝对禁止 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字、标签、页面截图、多人、无关物件、水印。不要在角色身上使用 #00ff00 或接近绿幕的颜色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Cen Dengyao, a 32-year-old East Asian male underground shopping-mall emergency broadcast guide for the Nanhuan Evacuation Bureau. He has a very bulky muscular adult male power build: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, huge upper arms, thick forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded mass. Warm wheat skin, wide square face, a short old scar at the tail of the right eyebrow, narrow deep-brown eyes, thick straight brows lowered; neat gray-black very short hair with a small white-line highlight at the tips, and a trimmed short beard. Protective command expression: thick lips slightly open as if giving a low evacuation direction, brows lowered and eyes alert. Outfit judged by COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md: a clean white fitted long-sleeve shirt tucked into high-waist trousers, visibly stretched across chest, shoulders, and arms; a short mist-gray emergency shoulder cape layer fixed to the back shoulders and chest strap, not covering the white shirt; high-waist dark teal-black wide-pleated evacuation uniform trousers with thin white guide lines along the sides; low-cut charcoal anti-slip guide shoes. Accessories: diagonal chest broadcast-mic strap connected to a narrow waist cinch, one white broadcast glove, gray wrist wrap on the other hand, a cord necklace with an old broadcast key tag. Visible weapon object: a folding roadblock light sign held in one hand, readable as a physical prop that can unfold into a shield and temporary barrier; the chest broadcast microphone links to it with restrained low-glow white guide lines, with small warning-yellow accents only on the sign edge and buckles. Fantasy anchor: a few subtle low-glow white arrow marks and short barrier lines from the unfolded sign, no strong diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no grimy industrial texture. Style: clean Kyoto Animation-like TV anime game character concept art, crisp readable outline, tidy cel shading, fresh colors, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green on the character.

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Denghou Baichuan, codename Fanzhan, a 34-year-old rainy-night bus shelter warden for a modern urban transit bureau. Generate the character from the current attributes. Single character only. Full body visible from head to rain boots, centered with generous padding. The style reference is only for body proportion and drawing style; do not copy the reference character. Body: a very bulky muscular adult male beyond the body floor, extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, large upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded power build, warm olive wheat skin. Face: broad long-square face, neat short chin beard, short black hair brushed back with one dark blue-gray temple highlight, a small rain-line scar on the left cheekbone, deep hazel-brown downturned eyes. Protective open-command expression: mouth open as if shouting to stop the last bus, brows lowered, eyes clear and determined. Outfit: a clean fitted white short-sleeve top tucked into high-waist deep ink-green pleated station trousers, the white top visibly stretched across chest, shoulders, and arms in clean cel shading; short translucent rain shoulder layer resting only over the shoulders and upper back, not covering the white chest and torso, pale rain-gray anime color block with night-blue edge binding; low rain-gray dispatcher belt with a folded timetable tag and small rain-ticket clip; matte night-blue tall rain boots; one dark gray dispatcher glove on the left hand and a white wrist wrap on the right hand. Accessories and props: short chain with a dark-silver waiting-light tag at the collar, tiny amber lamp core, one folded bus-stop sign umbrella frame held as the visible weapon, dark-silver ribs, night-blue handle, amber waiting-light nodes. Fantasy anchor: restrained amber light and a few silver-white station lines only on the umbrella-frame nodes, collar tag, and boot sole markings; compact and tidy, no diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal accents, rain layer as a flat translucent anime shape; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean Kyoto Animation-like TV anime game character concept art, crisp readable linework, tidy modern urban fantasy design, minimal dirt and grime, urban first and fantasy second, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no diagram, no chart, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character, props, aura, reflections, or materials.
metaDesign.propsPrompt: 折叠站牌伞骨、候灯小牌、折叠时刻牌、雨票夹，以暗银、夜蓝、琥珀候灯节点为核心。
metaDesign.costumePrompt: 白色贴身短袖扎进高腰深墨绿宽褶候站裤，短半透明雨肩层只压在肩背上，低腰调度带形成站务轮廓。
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：灯候柏川，34岁男性，雨夜候车亭管理员。现代都市幻想，全身角色立绘，单人，从头到雨靴完整可见。体型是非常厚实强壮的成年男性下限之上：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖颈和斜方肌、巨大上臂和前臂、强壮大腿、圆厚有压迫感的力量体格。暖橄榄麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，修整短下巴胡，短黑发后梳，鬓角一小撮暗青灰挑染，左颧细短雨痕疤，深榛褐下垂眼。保护性开口指令表情：嘴张开像正在喊停末班车，眉压低，眼神清醒坚定。服装：白色贴身短袖上衣扎进高腰深墨绿宽褶候站裤，衣料干净赛璐璐色块，胸肩和手臂被撑紧；短半透明雨肩层停在肩背上方，不遮住胸腹白色上衣，浅雨灰动画色块，夜蓝包边；低腰雨灰调度带挂折叠时刻牌和小雨票夹；哑面夜蓝高筒雨靴，左手深灰调度手套，右手白色腕带。配件：暗银候灯小牌短链，一点琥珀灯芯；手持折叠站牌伞骨，暗银伞骨、夜蓝握柄、琥珀候灯节点。幻想锚点只在伞骨节点、候灯小牌和鞋底站线出现克制琥珀光与少量银白站线，不要扩散大光效。干净动画游戏角色概念图，清晰线条，简洁赛璐璐阴影，现代都市为主，幻想为辅，少灰尘少脏污。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿色幕，一整块均匀颜色，无渐变、无纹理、无地面、无投影、无场景。禁止文字、标签、UI、图标、角色表、多人物、水印。角色和道具上不要出现 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Feng Ku Lao Shen, a 35-year-old underground archive seal warden. He is an extremely bulky, powerful adult male with very broad shoulders, thick chest, narrow strong waist, massive forearms, strong thighs, warm wheat skin, a broad rectangular face, short neat jaw stubble, a short paper-cut scar above the right eyebrow, black short hair combed back with tiny cold-silver highlights, and cold gray-blue narrow eyes. Expression: controlled and serious, mouth line pressed flat, gaze forward as if checking someone's archive access permission. IMPORTANT COSTUME REQUIREMENT: he must wear a clean tight white long-sleeve work shirt that wraps the torso closely; through the fitted white fabric, the contour of his pectorals and abdominal muscles must be clearly readable with tasteful cel-shaded cloth tension, wrinkles, and shadows. The shirt is opaque, dry, non-transparent, and not wet; no bare torso, no exposed abdomen, no nipples, no skin showing through fabric. Outfit: no outerwear, no jacket, no vest, no robe, no cloak, no open shirt; clean tight white long-sleeve archive work shirt tucked into high-waist ink-black straight work pants; wide-toe low archive patrol shoes; one ink-black sealing glove and the other hand wrapped with a white wrist wrap; an old-silver archive key tag close to the collar; a narrow ink-black utility belt carrying a wax-seal case, a heavy seal stamp, and a short key ring. Props/action: he holds a heavy dark-red wax seal stamp and a string of old-silver archive keys, standing like he is guarding a sealed archive door. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow cold-blue seal marks on the archive key tag, seal stamp edge, and belt tags; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: very bulky adult male body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and cloth folds, clear tight-shirt abdominal contour under opaque fabric, simplified metal and wax accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no photoreal muscle rendering, no glossy leather, no wet shirt, no translucent fabric, no torn clothing, no dust, no grime, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：封库老沈，35岁男性，地下档案封签护库员。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、强壮收紧的腰、巨大前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，整齐短胡茬，右眉上方短浅纸割旧痕，黑色短发向后梳，带少量冷银灰高光，冷灰蓝窄眼。表情克制严肃，嘴线压平，像在判断对方是否有查阅权限。服装硬性要求：必须穿干净白色紧身长袖工作衣，白衣紧密包裹胸腹；隔着不透明的白色布料必须能清楚读出胸肌和腹肌轮廓，用克制的赛璐璐布料张力、褶皱和阴影表现。衣服是不透明、干燥、不湿身、不透肉；不要裸露躯干、不要露腹、不要露点、不要透视。服装：无外套，不要夹克、马甲、长袍、披风、开襟衬衫；干净白色紧身长袖档案库工作衣扎进墨黑高腰直筒工装长裤；宽头低帮档案巡守鞋；一只墨黑封签手套，另一只手缠白色护腕；领口附近旧银档案钥匙牌；窄墨黑工具腰带挂封蜡匣、沉重印章和短钥匙串。道具是深红封蜡印章和旧银档案钥匙串，姿态像在守住密档库封门。幻想锚点很克制，只在钥匙牌、印章边缘和腰带标签有少量冷蓝低光封签纹，不要强光。使用上传参考图只作为画风、厚重成年男性体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条、简单赛璐璐肌肉和布料褶皱，重点是紧身白衣下清楚但克制的腹肌轮廓；不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要湿衣、不要透明布料、不要破衣、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，单人居中全身，从头到鞋完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Shuang Ku A Bai, a 31-year-old underground cold-store porter and inspection runner. He is a very bulky, powerful adult male with very broad shoulders, thick chest, huge upper arms, massive forearms, strong thighs, sturdy calves, warm wheat skin with a slight cold-environment blush, a broad round-square face, short clean stubble, a shallow old frostbite mark on the outside of the right calf, black short spiky hair with tiny ice-blue-gray highlights, and ice gray-blue eyes. Expression: bright but alert, slight confident smile, eyebrows warning people not to step on wet ice. IMPORTANT COSTUME REQUIREMENT: he must wear visible shorts and white socks. No long pants, no full-length trousers, no tall boots hiding the socks, no coat, no jacket, no apron. Outfit: clean white fitted short-sleeve athletic work shirt with a small low-temperature number plate on the chest; navy-blue cargo shorts ending above the knees, wide structured leg openings, clearly exposing muscular thighs, calves, and socks; thick pure white mid-calf athletic socks, sock cuffs clearly visible at mid-calf with one thin ice-blue stripe; low-cut anti-slip cold-store work shoes that do not cover the socks, light gray uppers, navy soles, old-silver buckles; short white wrist wraps and navy half-finger moving gloves; an old-silver cold-store key tag near the collar; a narrow navy utility belt carrying a thermometer, cold-store keys, and a short seal-cutter. Props/action: he holds a short-handled seal-cutter and an old-silver cold-store key tag, standing in a fast ready-to-run pose like he is about to check one more locked door. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow ice-blue safety seal marks on the key tag, thermometer, and shorts edge tape; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: very bulky adult male body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and folds, simplified cloth and metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no photoreal muscle rendering, no glossy leather, no frost clouds, no ice particles, no wet material, no dust, no grime, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：霜库阿柏，31岁男性，地下霜库搬运巡检员。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、巨大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿、结实小腿，暖麦色皮肤带一点低温环境的浅红，宽圆方脸，短胡茬，右小腿外侧浅旧冻伤纹，黑色短刺发带少量冰蓝灰高光，冰灰蓝眼睛。表情爽朗但警觉，轻微自信笑，像在提醒别人别踩湿滑冰面。服装硬性要求：必须穿短裤，必须穿白袜；不要长裤、不要全长裤、不要高靴遮住袜子、不要外套、不要夹克、不要围裙。服装：干净白色贴身短袖运动工作衫，胸口小型低温编号牌；海军蓝工装短裤，长度在膝盖上方，裤腿宽而挺，必须清楚露出强壮大腿、小腿和袜子；厚白色中筒运动袜，袜口到小腿中段，必须清楚可见，袜口有一圈细冰蓝线；低帮防滑冷库工作鞋，不遮住白袜，浅灰鞋面、海军蓝鞋底、旧银扣件；白色短护腕和海军蓝半指搬运手套；领口附近旧银冷库钥匙牌；窄海军蓝工具腰带挂温度计、冷库钥匙和短柄封条剪。道具是一把短柄封条剪和旧银冷库钥匙牌，姿态像准备再去检查一道锁住的冷库门。幻想锚点很克制，只在钥匙牌、温度计和短裤边缘封条有少量冰蓝低光，不要强光。使用上传参考图只作为画风、厚重成年男性体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条和简单赛璐璐阴影，不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要霜雾冰粒、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，单人居中全身，从头到鞋完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：风井老佟，39岁男性，地下风井校音员。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖、巨大斜方肌、巨大上臂和前臂、宽手掌、强壮大腿，暖小麦色皮肤，宽方脸，短硬胡茬，左耳下方短旧裂伤，深灰蓝窄眼，深灰黑短发带少量冷蓝灰高光。表情是专注侧听的警告：嘴微闭，眉压低，像听到远处风声变调。服装：不要夹克、外套、披风；短款暗酒红消音护肩背带，石墨黑边和旧铜声学扣件，不形成外套；象牙白贴身厚棉长袖工作衫，袖口收紧；石墨黑高腰工装长裤，宽直裤腿，膝部雾灰抗磨护片；宽头风井检修靴，厚靴底，暗酒红脚踝稳定绑带；石墨黑半指校音手套，指节有象牙白防震垫；喉结附近有旧铜共鸣刻环；宽石墨黑工具腰带挂圆形风压表、短调音槌和密封塞。道具是一支沉重旧铜共鸣叉和一枚圆形风压表，姿态像在让所有人安静并跟随他的节拍。幻想锚点很克制，只在共鸣刻环、共鸣叉和风压表刻度有少量冷蓝低光，不要强光、不要风效。使用上传参考图只作为画风、厚重成年男性体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条和简单赛璐璐阴影，不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要烟雾风效、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，单人居中全身，从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Lan Jing A Zhai, a 34-year-old underground high-voltage cable-well line warden. He is an extremely tall, very bulky, powerful adult male with very broad shoulders, thick chest, huge trapezius, thick back, massive forearms, large hands, strong calves, warm olive skin, a wide blunt square face, short black stubble on chin and upper lip, a shallow burn scar from the right eyebrow tail to the temple, black buzz cut hair with tiny old-copper highlights. Expression: calm warning face, lips pressed flat, dark golden-brown narrow eyes looking forward as if judging invisible current. Outfit: a short fitted graphite-black insulated work vest, open at the front but close to the body; a bone-white fitted collarless heavy-cotton short-sleeve work shirt with a tiny simplified cable-well number plate on the chest; high-waist insulating-gray work pants with straight legs and simplified reinforced knee and outer-thigh panels; wide-toe high-voltage insulated boots with thick soles and ceramic-white ankle guard rings; thick bone-white insulating gloves with graphite-black palms, the right glove half removed to show finger-joint bandages; a cracked ceramic insulating charm below the collarbone; a wide graphite-black tool waist belt with a voltage meter, insulated clamps, and a short cable spool. Props/action: he holds a heavy cable-pulling hook and an old-copper-rimmed high-voltage tester, standing like he is blocking people from touching a live cable. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow dark-amber warning sigil engravings on the ceramic charm, high-voltage tester dial, and cable hook marks; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: very bulky adult male body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and folds, simplified metal and ceramic accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no photoreal muscle rendering, no glossy leather, no sparks, no electric arcs, no wet material, no dust, no grime, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：缆井阿翟，34岁男性，地下高压电缆井守线人。极高、极宽、极厚实的成年男性，宽肩、厚胸、巨大斜方肌、厚背、粗前臂、大手、强壮小腿，暖橄榄色皮肤，宽钝方脸，黑色短硬胡茬，右眉尾到太阳穴有浅烧痕，黑色寸头带少量旧铜色高光。表情是冷静警告：嘴角压平，暗金褐窄眼向前，像在判断看不见的电流。服装：短款石墨黑绝缘工作背心，敞口但贴身；骨白色贴身无领厚棉短袖工作衫，胸口有简化电缆井编号小牌；高腰绝缘灰工装长裤，直裤腿，膝部和大腿外侧有简化加厚护片；宽头高压井绝缘靴，厚靴底，脚踝有陶瓷白护环；厚骨白绝缘手套，石墨黑掌面，右手半摘露出指节绷带；锁骨下有裂纹陶瓷绝缘护符；宽石墨黑工具腰封挂电压表、绝缘夹和短线轴。道具是一把沉重卷缆钩和一只旧铜边高压检测表，姿态像在阻止别人碰带电缆线。幻想锚点很克制，只在陶瓷护符、检测表刻度和卷缆钩刻线有少量暗琥珀低光警示符号，不要强光、不要电弧。使用上传参考图只作为画风、厚重成年男性体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条和简单赛璐璐阴影，不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要火花电弧、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，单人居中全身，从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：雨闸老秦，37岁男性，地下雨洪闸门巡守员。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖、巨大斜方肌、粗前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，短硬胡茬，左颧骨短浅旧划痕，黑褐寸头带冷银灰小高光。表情是保护性低声命令：嘴微张像在说“往后退”，眉头压低，深琥珀窄眼警觉向前。服装根据 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md 判断：无外套；白色贴身厚棉长袖上衣扎进深雨蓝半身防水背带裤，背带宽而贴身，裤腿宽直，膝侧简化加固片，腰部接粗黑灰工具腰带；宽头黑色防滑雨闸靴，一只黑灰防水检修手套，另一只手缠白色腕带；旧银雨洪刻度牌贴近领口。道具是一根沉重闸门扳杆和一枚雨洪钥匙。幻想锚点很克制，只在雨洪钥匙、旧银刻度牌和闸杆刻线有少量暗红低光安全符号，不要强光。使用上传参考图只作为画风、壮厚体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条和简单赛璐璐阴影，不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要湿身效果、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，强壮可读剪影，单人居中全身，从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

Modern urban fantasy municipal weather-claim certifier, East Asian adult male, very bulky muscular body floor, extremely broad shoulders, thick neck and traps, heavy chest, thick upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded power build. Broad rectangular face, very short dark brown hair, short stubble, small raindrop-shaped pale scar under the left eye; controlled protective expression, firm speaking mouth mid-sentence as if announcing a ruling, lowered brows and clear attentive dark-brown eyes. Outfit: clean fitted white sleeveless undershirt tucked into high-waist muted olive-gray tapered trousers, no jacket, no coat, no vest, no open shirt, no overshirt; short translucent matte rain-cape panel clipped behind the shoulders but leaving the torso and arms visible, dark teal certificate harness across the ribs, off-white sleeve band on one upper arm, charcoal wide belt with sealed document tubes, one dark teal stamping glove, black-gray waterproof ankle boots. Signature item: compact brass-and-teal晴钟印 weather stamp that presses small restrained cyan rain-line seals near the hand. metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 生成当前属性中的角色：陆衡霁，单个人物，全身立绘，头到鞋完整可见。现代都市幻想市政气象理赔公证员，东亚成年男性，非常魁梧厚重，极宽肩、粗脖和斜方肌、厚胸、粗壮上臂和前臂、强壮大腿，力量型圆厚体格。宽长方脸，深棕极短发，短胡茬，左眼下有小水滴形浅色旧疤；克制保护性的公证神情，嘴呈坚定说话口型像正在宣告裁定，眉峰压低，深棕眼睛清醒专注。穿干净白色贴身无袖上衣并扎进高腰橄榄灰锥形长裤，无夹克、无大衣、无背心、无开襟衬衫、无外搭衬衫；肩后夹一片短款半透明哑面雨披片但露出胸肩和手臂，深青色证书束带绕过肋侧，单侧米白上臂环，炭黑宽腰带和封缄文书筒，单只深青盖章手套，黑灰防水短靴。招牌道具是黄铜与深青色晴钟印，可在手边压出少量克制的青蓝雨线封印。京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐，线条干净流畅，阴影块面概括，服装整洁，现代都市优先、幻想元素克制。参考图只用于体型比例、线条、上色和画风，不复制参考图角色的身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。禁止写实照片风，禁止摄影质感，禁止脏污工业氛围。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字、标签、图标、场景、多人。纯平面 #ff00ff 洋红色键背景；不要在角色、道具、反光或效果中使用洋红、粉、玫红、紫红或接近颜色。

metaDesign.characterHook: 一个能从错币落下的节奏里听出危险出口的地铁售票机巡检员，总在乘客迷路前先一步站到岔口。
metaDesign.characterConsistencyPrompt: 钟砚临：厚实体格、暖麦色皮肤、宽下颌方脸、短络腮胡、黑褐短寸侧分发、暗红棕挑染、暖灰站务衬衫、白色贴身上衣、黑橄榄站务裤、硬币匣和票据扫描器。
metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime cel-shaded character illustration of Yanlin Zhong, a 36-year-old male subway ticket-machine inspector from the North City Transfer Bureau night equipment team. He is an enormous thick-built adult man with extremely broad shoulders, thick chest, thick neck, massive upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, warm wheat skin, a broad square-jawed face, neat short boxed beard, a small maintenance scratch below the right ear, short black-brown side-parted crew cut hair with subtle dark red-brown highlights, and small deep-brown eyes. Expression: bright protective expression, short toothy smile as if warning a passenger, left brow slightly raised, eyes alert. Outfit: a warm-gray short-sleeve station-service shirt worn open over a clean white fitted heavy-cotton short-sleeve top tucked into the waist, the white top visibly stretched over chest and shoulders; black-olive high-waist tapered station trousers with flat maintenance pockets; wide-toe black-gray anti-slip station shoes, short white socks; one dark-gray maintenance glove, the other hand wrapped with white wrist tape; a narrow black belt connected to a diagonal coin cassette and a ticket scanner; a small old ticket-clip pendant close to the collar. Signature props: a transparent-lid coin cassette and a short maintenance wrench. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained warm-gold low-glow symbols on the misprinted coins, ticket-clip pendant, and scanner scale; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: bulky adult male body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simplified cel-shaded muscles and folds, no photoreal fabric grain, no photo realism, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dust, no grime, no oil stains. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个角色：钟砚临，36岁男性，北城换乘局夜班地铁售票机巡检员。非常厚实的成年壮汉，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖、巨大上臂和前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽下颌方脸，修整短络腮胡，右耳下方小检修划痕，黑褐短寸侧分发，少量暗红棕挑染，深棕小眼。表情是明亮保护性：露齿短笑像正要提醒乘客，左眉微抬，眼神警觉。服装：暖灰短袖站务衬衫开襟穿在干净白色贴身厚棉短袖上衣外，白上衣扎进腰部并清楚撑出胸肩体量；黑橄榄高腰锥形站务裤，扁平检修袋；宽头黑灰防滑站务鞋，短白袜；一只深灰检修手套，另一手缠白色腕带；窄黑腰带连接斜挎硬币匣和票据扫描器，小旧票夹坠贴近领口。标志道具：透明盖板硬币匣和短柄检修扳手；奇幻锚点只在错币、票夹坠、扫描器刻度上出现少量暖金低光符号，克制、干净、不要强光环。画风必须参考已上传风格图的体型语言、线条、赛璐璐上色和干净阴影，但不要复制参考图的脸、衣服、姿势、颜色或身份。干净动漫游戏角色概念立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐肌肉和衣褶阴影，不要写实布料纹理，不要照片感，不要油亮皮革，不要湿身，不要灰尘油污。单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留足边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无纹理、无地面、无阴影、无反射、无场景。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、角色设定表、文字、字母、标签、图标、面板、多人物、水印。角色身上不要使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

behaviorSystem.relaxedAction: 靠着售票机低声哼报站旋律

behaviorSystem.combatStance: 半侧身护人，硬币匣挡在前臂旁
behaviorSystem.attackRhythm: 先警告，再用硬币匣短促压制

metaDesign.characterHook: A massive bridge counterweight inspector who can hear structural danger through tiny vibrations and treats maintenance like a promise to the city.
metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime cel-shaded character illustration of Quarry Bridge Lao Han, a 41-year-old male bridge counterweight inspector from the North Ring Bridge Authority. He is an enormous thick-built adult man with extremely broad shoulders, thick chest, thick neck, huge forearms, strong thighs, warm tan skin, a broad rectangular face, neat square beard and mustache, a short pale scar across the right eyebrow, short swept-back black hair with a shaved low fade, small deep-set dark-brown eyes, and a steady protective half-smile with one brow slightly raised. Outfit: absolutely no outerwear; do not add a jacket, coat, vest layer, open shirt, cloak, cape, or overshirt. He wears a clean white fitted sleeveless heavy-cotton work top tucked into high-waist slate-gray wide utility trousers, the shirt visibly stretched over his chest and shoulders; a wide black utility belt with aged brass buckles, stone tally tags, chalk pouch, plumb bob, folded bridge ledger; wide black municipal inspection boots; one black fingerless measuring glove; the other hand bare with white wrist tape. Signature prop: a heavy crescent counterweight hook held low at his side, dark iron with muted brass measuring ticks. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained dull-blue measuring sigils on the hook ticks, stone tally tags, and brass bridge-number tag near the collar; compact, tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: bulky bara body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simplified cel-shaded muscles and folds, no photoreal fabric grain, no photo realism, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dust, no grime, no oil stains. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个角色：Quarry Bridge Lao Han，41岁男性，北环桥梁配重巡检员。非常高大厚实，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子、巨大前臂、强壮大腿，暖棕肤色，宽矩形脸，整齐方胡，右眉短浅疤，黑色短背头低渐层，深棕小眼，稳重保护性的微笑，眉毛略抬。服装：绝对无外套，不要夹克、外套、背心外层、开襟衬衫、斗篷或披风；干净白色贴身无袖厚棉工作上衣扎进高腰石板灰宽工装裤，胸肩被上衣清楚撑开；黑色宽工具腰带，黄铜扣件，石质计数牌，粉笔袋，铅锤，折叠桥梁账册；宽头黑色市政巡检靴；一只黑色半指测量手套，另一只手裸露并缠白色腕带。标志道具：一把沉重的新月形配重钩低垂握在手边，暗铁色，带少量旧黄铜刻度。奇幻锚点只在配重钩刻度、石质计数牌和黄铜桥号牌边缘出现少量暗蓝测量符号，克制、干净、不要强光环。画风必须参考已上传风格图的体型语言、线条、赛璐璐上色和干净阴影，但不要复制参考图的脸、衣服、姿势、颜色或身份。干净动漫游戏角色概念立绘，清晰粗线条，简单赛璐璐肌肉和衣褶阴影，不要写实布料纹理，不要照片感，不要油亮皮革，不要湿身，不要灰尘油污。单人全身，从头到靴完整可见，居中，留足边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无纹理、无地面、无阴影、无反射、无场景。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、角色设定表、文字、字母、标签、图标、面板、多人物、水印。角色身上不要使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Wen Zhu Lao Ni, a 38-year-old old-city greenhouse heat-pipe inspector. He is an enormous, thick-built adult male with extremely broad shoulders, thick chest, thick neck, huge trapezius, massive forearms, strong thighs, warm wheat skin, a wide square face, short stiff stubble, a short burn scar on the left cheekbone, black-brown buzz cut hair with subtle red-copper highlights, drooping narrow dark-amber eyes, and a controlled protective expression: mouth slightly open as if giving a low command, brows gently lowered and eyes alert. Apply COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md costume judgment: no outerwear at all; do not add a jacket, vest layer, open shirt, cloak, coat, or cape. Outfit: a clean white fitted heavy-cotton long-sleeve shirt tucked into high-waist deep charcoal wide work trousers, a short diagonal temperature-gauge strap, a wide black-gray tool belt with red-copper buckles, wide-toe black-gray heatproof inspection boots, one deep charcoal heatproof glove, and a white wrist wrap on the other hand. A small greenhouse-glass ID plate sits close inside the collar. Props/action: one hand holds a red-copper valve-wheel tool; the belt carries a short valve wrench, a copper temperature gauge, and a wax-seal clamp. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained warm-amber low-glow sigil marks on the valve-wheel scale, copper gauge, and edge of the glass ID plate; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dust, no grime, no oil stains, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：温铸老倪，38岁男性，旧城温室热管巡检员。非常高大厚实，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子、巨大斜方肌、粗前臂和强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽方脸，短硬胡茬，左颧骨短烫痕，黑褐色短寸头带红铜细挑染，暗琥珀下垂细眼，克制保护型表情：嘴微张像在低声下令，眉毛轻压，眼神清醒警觉。服装根据 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md 判断：无外套，不要夹克、背心外层、开襟衬衫、披风或斗篷；穿干净白色贴身厚棉长袖上衣，扎进高腰深炭灰宽工装长裤；一条短斜背测温带和宽黑灰工具腰封，红铜扣件，宽头黑灰耐热巡检靴，一只深炭灰耐热手套，另一只手缠白色腕带，衣领内侧贴着小温室玻璃证牌。道具：一手握红铜阀轮式工具，腰间挂短阀门扳手、测温铜表和封蜡夹。奇幻锚点只在阀轮刻度、测温铜表和玻璃证牌边缘出现少量暖琥珀低光符纹，紧凑克制，不要强光环。材质语言：干净动画色块，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐阴影，简化金属点缀；不要写实布料纹理，不要油亮皮革，不要湿身效果，不要灰尘油污，不要照片感。干净动画游戏角色概念立绘，单人全身，从头到靴完整可见，居中，留足边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无纹理、无地面、无阴影、无反射、无场景。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、角色设定表、文字、字母、标签、图标、面板、多人物、水印。角色身上不要使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

He is a very bulky, powerful adult male: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and trapezius, large upper arms and forearms, strong thighs and calves, substantial rounded power build, warm wheat skin, wide rectangular face, thick straight eyebrows, narrow slightly downturned dark-tea eyes, neat short stubble, short side-parted dark black-brown hair, calm gentle confident expression. Apply COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md costume judgment: no outerwear at all; do not add a jacket, vest, open shirt, overshirt, cardigan, or coat. Outfit: a clean white tight fitted long-sleeve shirt tucked into high-waist wide-pleated rain-gray patrol trousers, sleeves rolled to mid-forearm so the thick chest, shoulders, and forearms read clearly; trouser cuffs tucked into short black-charcoal anti-slip rain-service boots; a narrow tool belt plus a diagonal muted green-gray rain-service harness that does not cover the chest shape; one fog-gray inspection glove, the other hand bare with a small rain-gauge scale mark on the inner right wrist; a short cord necklace with a small old-copper rain-gauge plate close to the chest. Props/action: standing in a practical patrol-dispatch pose, one hand holding a folded metal rain ruler, the other holding a compact rain-pressure gauge, as if he has just read the rainfall and is about to route the city crew. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow cold-cyan marks on the ruler scale, pressure-gauge needle, and wrist scale mark; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal muscle rendering, no gritty grime, no mud, no wet-clothing effect, no realistic fabric grain, no glossy leather, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean Kyoto-animation-like anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single character only, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background only, one uniform magenta color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #ff00ff or visually similar magenta anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：秦云枢，36岁男性，城市雨务调度员。非常厚实强壮的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子和斜方肌、强壮前臂、厚实大腿和小腿，暖小麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，浓直眉，窄长下垂眼，深茶色眼睛，整齐短胡茬，深黑棕短侧分头发，温和笃定表情。服装根据 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md 判断：无外套，不要夹克、马甲、开衫、外套或外层衬衫；上身是白色紧身长袖上衣，袖口卷到前臂中段，扎进高腰裤，清楚读出胸肩和手臂体积；下身是雨灰偏橄榄的高腰宽褶巡检裤，裤脚束进短筒防滑雨务靴；有窄工具腰带和斜向墨绿灰雨务背带，背带不遮住胸型；一只雾灰巡检手套，另一只手露出右腕内侧雨量刻度印；胸前短绳挂一枚旧铜小雨量铜片。道具与动作：站在巡检姿势中，一只手拿折叠式金属雨尺，另一只手握小型雨压表，像刚判断完雨势准备调度路线。幻想锚点克制：雨尺刻度、雨压表指针和右腕刻度印有少量冷青低光，不要强光和大面积光效。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条、简单赛璐璐阴影和简化金属点缀；不要写实肌肉渲染、不要灰尘泥水、不要油污、不要湿身效果、不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要时装摄影感。干净动画游戏立绘，强壮可读剪影，单人全身，从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #ff00ff 平面色键背景，不要渐变、纹理、地面、阴影、反射、场景或文字。不要在人物身上使用 #ff00ff 或相近洋红色。

generationProfile.notes:
【生图读取规则】
全身图生成时，只读取【提示词】模块里的最终提示词和已上传的风格参考图。
不直接读取身份、特征、服装、人格、数值等零散字段。
这些字段只用于先生成最终提示词，不会再被追加到生图提示里。

1. 最终提示词
- 必须明确写成：单个人物、全身立绘、头到脚完整可见。
- 要把角色的身份、身形、脸部、发型、服装、工具或武器转成可视化描述。
- 默认写成现代都市角色，用一个招牌装备、异能、魔法道具或隐藏身份做核心设计钩子。
- 默认体型下限是非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂和强壮大腿，不是修长瘦男主，也不是普通运动型。
- 写服装字段前必须先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭，不把它当成固定服装库。
- 白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣；要用干净赛璐璐阴影读出胸肩手臂体积，不要湿身或写实肌肉。
- 如果用户说脱掉外套，最终提示词要明确禁止 jacket/coat/vest/open shirt/overshirt，让紧身白色上衣成为上身主视觉。
- 材质用干净动画设计语言：平面色块、概括褶皱、简化金属小点缀；不要写实布料纹理、油亮反光或时装摄影语言。
- 画风要明确写成京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐：线条干净流畅，阴影块面概括，整体干净无灰尘。
- 英文提示词作为生图主文本，中文作为理解备份。
- 名字要像正式角色名，严禁避免默认使用「老X」「小X」「阿X」这类通用外号。

2. 风格参考图
- 只参考体型比例、线条、上色和画风。
- 不复制参考图的角色身份、脸、衣服、道具、姿势和配色。

3. 禁止内容
- 不要 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字标签、页面截图、多人组图。
- 不要把生成配置或属性列表做成画面内容。
- 不要把工业感、脏污、灰尘、油污、铁锈或废土纹理当成主要设计主张。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Tie Liang Lao Zhu, a 39-year-old heavy cargo dock worker doing physical labor. He is an extremely bulky, powerful adult male: very broad shoulders, thick chest, thick neck, huge trapezius, massive forearms, strong thighs and calves, warm wheat skin, wide square face, short stiff stubble, an old scar outside the right eyebrow, black buzz cut hair, calm focused expression. Apply COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md costume judgment: no outerwear at all; do not add a jacket, vest, open shirt, overshirt, or coat. Outfit: a clean white tight heavy-cotton tank top tucked into deep indigo high-waist work shorts that end above the knees, reinforced side pockets, small warning-yellow trim, a wide black canvas tool belt with small hooks and tie-down buckles, thick black-gray steel-toe work boots, one old iron-gray hauling glove, the other hand wrapped with a white wrist wrap, a short dark-red work ID cord close to the chest. Props/action: working pose while moving cargo, one hand holding a huge old iron sledgehammer with a black handle, the other side of his shoulder carrying bundled heavy cargo ropes/straps, as if he has just stabilized a load. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow safety sigil engravings on the hammer head and work ID plate; compact, tidy, no strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and folds, simplified metal accents; no photoreal muscle rendering, no gritty grime, no oil stains, no rusty texture, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：铁梁老祝，39岁男性，东港重件搬运工。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子、巨大斜方肌、粗前臂、强壮大腿和小腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽方脸，短硬胡茬，右眉外侧旧伤，黑色寸头。服装根据 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md 判断：无外套；白色紧身厚棉背心塞进深靛蓝高腰工装短裤，短裤到膝上，侧袋加固，有少量警示黄压条；宽帆布工具腰带，厚底黑灰防砸工靴，一只旧铁灰搬运手套，另一只手缠白色护腕，红色工牌短绳贴在胸口旁。动作是干活儿中的搬运姿态：一只手握着巨大的旧铁灰大铁锤，另一侧肩背捆扎好的重货绳带，像刚把货物搬稳。幻想锚点很克制：锤头边缘和工牌上有少量低亮度安全符号刻痕，不要强光。材质是干净动画色块和简单赛璐璐阴影，不要写实肌肉渲染、不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，强壮可读剪影，单人全身，从头到靴完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

generationProfile.notes:
重点方向：都市为主，奇幻为辅
体型下限：非常壮、非常厚实、肌肉量很大的成年男性，不要只是普通运动型
极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖和斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿，圆润但有压重力量
如果用户要更壮，要写成比参考图更大、更厚、更有力量的巨型力量感体格
生成服装前先读 COSTUME_DESIGN_GUIDE.md，用服装设计门槛判断穿搭
白色贴身上衣是核心偏好：紧身T-shirt、背心、长袖或其他可扎进腰部结构的紧身白色上衣，要读出胸肩和手臂体积
如果用户说脱掉外套，就不要再补回夹克、外套、背心、开襟衬衫或其他上身外层
现实职业或社会角色作为基底
一个清晰的核心设计：招牌装备、异能、魔法道具或隐藏身份
现代服装与轻量奇幻细节结合，服装必须好看而不只是实用
用数值、世界阵营、战斗方式、身体轮廓和反重复交换来决定服装
京都动画式清爽线条
干净赛璐璐阴影，阴影概括明确
整体干净、无灰尘、主动降噪
颜色清透，角色轮廓易读

默认禁止：少女
萝莉
萌系
偶像风、女性化男性
瘦弱体型
普通运动型体格
修长纤细男主
写实肌肉渲染
照片感
湿身效果
写实布料纹理、写实材质反光、时装摄影语言
油亮皮革、湿身材质、拟真塑料或乳胶感
工业风作为主设计
大量灰尘、油污、铁锈、脏污质感
废土、煤灰、混浊阴影

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Shen Yanqu, a 36-year-old municipal noise-sealing archivist for a public memory library in a modern urban fantasy setting. Single character only. He must have a very bulky muscular adult male power build as the body floor: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, huge upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, and substantial rounded mass. Warm wheat skin, broad square face with a heavy jaw, deep amber eyes, thick straight brows, calm gentle expression, a small old scar at the outer right eyebrow, black-brown very short crew cut with a tiny old-copper highlight, and a neatly trimmed short beard. Outfit: a clean white fitted long-sleeve shirt tucked into the waist, visibly stretched around chest, shoulders, and arms; a sleeveless deep ink-gray uniform long vest falling to mid-thigh with side slits and restrained dark wine-red lining; high-waist charcoal wide straight uniform trousers with a paper-seal pocket near one knee; thick-soled black-gray quiet civic shoes; one dark wine-red half-palm stamping glove; a white sealing-strip wrap on the other wrist; a narrow document waist binder carrying a small ink box and ticket clip; a small old-copper archive key necklace. Signature props: an old-copper sound-sealing stamp and a few semi-transparent paper ticket seals. Fantasy anchor: only small restrained warm-white low-glow marks on the stamp engravings and seal edges, compact and tidy. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, tidy modern urban fantasy design. Composition: centered standing pose, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. The style reference is only for body proportion, line quality, and drawing style; do not copy the reference character. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：沈砚阙，36岁男性，城市噪声封存管理员。现代都市奇幻设定，公共记忆馆岗位。体型必须是非常厚实的巨型成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖颈和斜方肌、巨大上臂与前臂、强壮大腿，白色贴身长袖明显包住胸肩和手臂。暖麦色皮肤，宽方脸，下颌厚重，深琥珀眼，浓平眉，温和沉静表情，右眉尾浅旧疤，黑棕短寸发，极细旧铜色挑染，修整短络腮胡。服装：干净白色贴身长袖扎进高腰裤；外层是深墨灰无袖制服长马甲，直落到大腿，侧边开衩，内侧少量深酒红，露出厚实手臂；深炭灰高腰宽直筒制服裤，膝侧有封条袋；厚底黑灰静音公务鞋；右手深酒红半掌盖印手套，左腕白色封条带；窄型文件腰封挂小印泥盒和封存票夹，细链旧铜馆钥。道具是封声铜印和半透明票据封条，只有铜印刻痕和封条边缘有少量暖白低光。材质是干净动画色块、简单赛璐璐褶皱、简化金属小点，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或摄影感。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无地面、无阴影、无反射。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、角色设定表、文字、标签、图标、场景、多人、水印。角色身上不要出现 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Bai Yaochi, a 28-year-old community night-court sports coach in a modern urban fantasy sports setting. Single character only. He must be a very bulky muscular adult male: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, large upper arms and forearms, powerful thighs and calves, substantial rounded athletic power build, not slender and not merely athletic. Healthy warm bronze-wheat skin, broad-cheekboned square-jawed face, bright upturned amber-brown eyes, cheerful focused expression, short sporty deep chestnut-black hair with a thin dark orange-brown highlight, short stubble, and a short horizontal scar on his left brow bone. Outfit: a clean white fitted athletic tank top tucked into the shorts waistband, visibly wrapped around chest, shoulders, and arms in clean cel shading; no jacket or outerwear; only a lightweight deep ink-blue crossed sports timing harness over the tank top with small orange-red timing buckles, leaving the chest and shoulders of the white top clearly visible; deep ink-blue athletic shorts ending at mid-thigh with warm stone-gray side panels and a few orange-red timing lines; clean white mid-calf athletic socks clearly visible, with two thin orange-red stripes at the sock cuffs; heavy-sole coal-black training sneakers; white athletic wrist wraps on both hands; a narrow sport waist pouch and timing chip buckle at the shorts waistband; a small old metal whistle pendant close to the collar. Fantasy anchor: only a few compact orange-red low-glow scale marks on the timing wristband, small waist-pouch screen, and harness buckles, suggesting the power to replay one second three times; no broad aura and no diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, tidy sportswear shapes, small simplified metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dirty texture, no rust, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean TV anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, fresh readable colors, strong silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green anywhere on the character, props, glow, reflections, or effects.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个角色：柏曜驰，28岁男性，社区夜场运动教练。现代都市奇幻运动系设定，体型必须是非常壮硕的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖颈和斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿和小腿，整体是厚实饱满的运动力量体格，不要瘦弱或普通运动型。健康暖古铜麦色皮肤，宽颧方下颌脸，明亮上扬琥珀棕眼，爽朗专注表情，深栗黑运动短发带暗橙棕细挑染，短胡茬，左眉骨短横疤。服装：干净白色贴身运动背心扎进短裤腰，白色背心要清楚包住胸肩和手臂；无外套，只有轻量深墨蓝交叉运动计时背带贴在背心外侧，带小型橙红计时扣件但不遮住胸肩主体；深墨蓝短运动裤，裤长到大腿中段，侧边有暖石灰拼片和少量橙红计时线；白色中筒运动袜必须清楚可见，袜口有两道细橙红线；厚底煤黑训练鞋；双手缠白色运动腕带；短裤腰部有窄运动腰包和计时芯片扣；细绳旧金属哨贴近领口。奇幻锚点只在计时护腕、腰包小屏和背带扣件上有少量橙红低光刻度，表现把一秒回放三次的能力，不要大面积发光。材质语言是干净动画色块、简洁赛璐璐阴影、概括运动布料形状和小面积金属色块，不要写实布纹、油亮皮革、湿身效果、灰尘、锈迹或摄影质感。单人全身立绘，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距，清晰线条，干净TV动画赛璐璐上色。背景必须是纯平面 #00ff00 绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无地面、无阴影、无文字、无UI、无角色表。不要在角色、道具、光效或反射里使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个角色：郁砚声，37岁男性，夜间地铁广播与寻人调度员。现代都市奇幻设定，体型必须是非常壮硕的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖颈和斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿，整体是厚实饱满的力量体格，不要瘦弱或普通运动型。暖橄榄麦色皮肤，宽颧长方脸，细长下垂深灰棕眼，疲惫温和表情，后梳深黑棕短发带暗紫灰细挑染，修整短胡茬，右太阳穴浅弧疤。服装：干净白色贴身背心扎进腰部，白色背心要清楚包住胸肩和手臂；外穿深墨蓝开襟短站务马甲，肩部略宽，前襟敞开，胸口有小型环线徽章；高腰暗煤黑宽直筒站务裤，腰侧接半围短站台腰裙片，用来挂票剪和线路卡，裤侧有窄紫罗兰线；厚底煤黑静音站务鞋；右手露指票剪手套，左手薄腕套；窄腰带连接票剪套、线路卡包和小型广播旋钮盒；短链旧站台哨贴近领口。奇幻锚点只在声纹票剪、广播旋钮盒和裤侧窄线处有少量紫罗兰低光声纹，表现剪开回音残留的力量，不要大面积发光。材质语言是干净动画色块、简洁赛璐璐阴影、概括站务制服形状和小面积金属色块，不要写实布纹、油亮皮革、湿身效果、灰尘、锈迹或摄影质感。单人全身立绘，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距，清晰线条，干净TV动画赛璐璐上色。背景必须是纯平面 #00ff00 绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无地面、无阴影、无文字、无UI、无角色表。不要在角色、道具、光效或反射里使用 #00ff00 或相近绿色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Qi Junheng, a 41-year-old high-rise elevator rescue coordinator in a modern urban fantasy city. Single character only. He must be a very bulky muscular adult male: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, large upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded power build, not slender and not merely athletic. Warm wheat skin, broad forehead and square jaw, narrow warm black-brown eyes, steady imposing expression, very short black-brown flat-top hair with a thin dark copper-red highlight, dense short beard, and a short vertical scar below his left ear. Outfit: no jacket or outerwear; a clean white fitted short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into the waist, visibly wrapped around chest, shoulders, and upper arms in clean cel shading; removable coal-black crossed braking harness straps across the chest with small orange-red emergency-stop buckles, leaving the white shirt clearly visible; deep cocoa-brown high-waist straight work trousers with a wide clean waistband and simplified knee guard panels; heavy-sole coal-black anti-slip elevator-service shoes; short-finger braking gloves on both hands; a wide belt connected to an emergency-stop ticket clip, floor cards, and a small brake-device case; a small old floor-number tag pendant close to the collar. Fantasy anchor: only a few compact orange-red low-glow scale marks on the emergency-stop ticket clip, harness buckles, and belt markers, suggesting the power to pause falling inertia; no broad aura and no diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, tidy cotton-like white shirt, simplified workwear shapes, small simplified metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dirty texture, no rust, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean TV anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, fresh readable colors, strong silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green anywhere on the character, props, glow, reflections, or effects.

Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Cen Jiwen, a 39-year-old municipal rain-route dispatcher in a modern urban fantasy city. Single character only. He must be a very bulky muscular adult male: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, large upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded power build, not slender and not merely athletic. metaDesign.characterHook: 一个夜间失物归还公证员，能用回执印章让物件显出最后主人的影子，并把错误的归属短暂锁死。
metaDesign.characterConsistencyPrompt: 陆衡栎是极宽肩厚胸的36岁男性，夜间公证员身份，核心视觉为白色贴身T恤、石墨长开衫、酒红背带、旧金回执印章和钥匙串。
metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Lu Hengli, a 36-year-old night lost-property notarization clerk in a modern urban fantasy city. Single character only. He must be a very bulky muscular adult male: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, large upper arms and forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded power build, not slender and not merely athletic. Warm light-wheat skin, broad-jawed rectangular face, slightly drooping dark tea-brown eyes, calm inspecting expression, side-parted short chestnut-black hair with a thin old-gold highlight, neat short beard, and a small scar at the tail of his right eyebrow. Outfit: a clean white fitted short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into the waist, visibly stretched in clean cel shading across chest, shoulders, and arms; an open graphite-gray long cardigan-like civic uniform layer with high side slits and tightened cuffs; high-waist warm black-brown straight trousers with deep pleats and narrow burgundy side lines; burgundy double suspenders connected to a narrow tool belt carrying keys, ticket clips, and a stamp case; one half-palm stamping glove on the right hand, one exposed-finger left hand; black-brown low-cut thick-sole city patrol shoes. Accessories: an old-gold receipt stamp, a night-cabinet key ring, and a small old cabinet tag necklace. Fantasy anchor: the receipt stamp and dark red stamp ink have a few compact low-glow old-gold marks that suggest ownership-trace magic; no broad aura and no diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, tidy uniform cloth shapes, small simplified metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no dirt, no rust, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean TV anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, fresh readable colors, strong silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character, props, glow, reflections, or effects.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个角色：陆衡栎，36岁男性，夜间失物归还公证员。现代都市奇幻设定，体型必须是非常壮硕的成年男性：极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖颈和斜方肌、大上臂、粗前臂、强壮大腿，白色贴身短袖T恤要清楚包住胸肩和手臂并扎进腰部。温暖浅麦色皮肤，宽下颌长方脸，内双下垂深茶棕眼，温和审视表情，栗黑侧分短发带旧金细挑染，修整短络腮胡，右眉尾浅短疤。服装：干净白色贴身短袖T恤，外穿石墨灰长开衫式制服外层，前襟敞开、侧缝高开叉、袖口收紧；高腰暖黑褐深褶直筒长裤，裤侧窄酒红线；酒红双背带连接窄工具腰带，挂钥匙、票夹和印章套；右手半掌盖印手套，左手露指；黑褐低帮厚底巡柜鞋。配件：旧金回执印章、夜柜钥匙串、细链旧柜牌。奇幻锚点只在印章边缘和暗红印泥上有少量低光，表现能显出归属轨迹的力量，不要大面积发光。材质语言是干净动画色块、简洁赛璐璐阴影、概括布料褶皱和小面积金属色块，不要写实布纹、油亮皮革、灰尘、锈迹或摄影质感。单人全身立绘，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距，清晰线条，干净TV动画赛璐璐上色。背景必须是纯平面 #00ff00 绿幕，单一颜色，无渐变、无地面、无阴影、无文字、无UI、无角色表。

metaDesign.characterHook: 一个能用封桩牌短暂加固脚下地面的地基监察员，像活着的承重柱一样守住城市裂缝前线。
metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime-style character illustration of Yue Chenli, a 41-year-old foundation sealing inspector from a modern city subsidence bureau. He is an even larger, thicker, more muscular adult male than the reference: huge sturdy build, extremely broad shoulders, massive heavy chest, very large upper arms and forearms, thick back, powerful thighs, warm deep wheat skin, a heavy square face, narrow deep rock-gray eyes, a calm stern expression, a short scar beside the bridge of his nose, very short black buzz-cut hair, and short stiff stubble. Outfit focus: NO OUTERWEAR at all, the jacket is completely removed. His upper body wears only a very tight clean white short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into high-waist work trousers. The white T-shirt must cling tightly to his chest, shoulders, upper arms, and torso; the sleeves are visibly stretched by his deltoids and biceps, emphasizing extreme muscular bulk without being glossy or wet. Lower body: high-waist heavy rock-blue-gray inspection work trousers with wide straight legs, reinforced knee-side pockets and a short stake sleeve; heavy black-charcoal anti-slip work boots; thick half-finger work gloves on both hands; a short cord necklace with an old steel foundation-stake tag; a wide tool belt carrying a pressure hammer and folding ruler. Props: a short-handled pressure hammer and a foundation-stake measuring ruler, clearly readable as city foundation inspection tools. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained orange-yellow low-glow calibration marks on the stake tag, belt ruler, and tool edges, compact and tidy, not a strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified old steel accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no jacket, no coat, no vest, no outerwear on upper body, no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：岳沉砺，41岁男性，地基封桩监察员。巨型厚实体格，极宽肩、厚胸、粗壮大臂和前臂，深暖麦色皮肤，宽厚方脸，深岩灰狭长眼，鼻梁侧短疤，黑色寸头，短硬胡茬。服装重点：完全不穿外套，外套已经脱掉；上半身只穿非常紧的白色短袖T恤，T恤贴住胸肌、肩膀和大臂，袖口被三角肌和肱二头肌撑紧，下摆扎进高腰岩蓝灰重型工装裤。下装为高腰宽腿监察工装裤，膝侧加固袋和短桩套，黑炭重型防滑靴，双手半指厚工装手套，短绳旧钢封桩牌，宽工具腰带挂测压锤和折叠标尺。手持短柄测压锤和封桩刻度尺。幻想锚点只在封桩牌、腰带刻度和工具边缘有少量橙黄低光，不能强发光。材质为干净动画色块、概括褶皱、简化金属点缀，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或摄影质感。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到脚完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，不能有渐变、纹理、地面、影子、文字或其他角色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime-style character illustration of Qi Yanzhou, a 39-year-old night patrol gas-lamp repair officer from an old modern city district. He is a tall, thick, sturdy adult male with extremely broad shoulders, a heavy chest, powerful forearms, warm deep wheat skin, a heavy rectangular face, narrow warm gray-brown eyes, a tired but gentle steady expression, a faint horizontal scar on his left cheekbone, short stiff black hair brushed upward with subtle gray-blue highlights, and neat short stubble. Outfit: a clean white fitted T-shirt tucked into high-waist wide-leg mist-blue-gray lampworker trousers; an open cropped coal-black lamp-service jacket with sleeves rolled to the forearms and a small brass-thread lamp bureau patch on the chest; a diagonal wick strap connected to a narrow tool belt carrying a small wrench and spare wick box; low-cut black-gray anti-slip lampworker boots; one thin repair glove on the left hand and a clean white wrist wrap on the right hand; a short chain necklace with a small brass lamp key. Props: a brass inspection lamp and a folding lamp-pole hook, clearly readable as old city lamp repair tools. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained warm-white low-glow marks inside the inspection lamp wick and on the chest patch, compact and tidy, not a strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified brass accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere on the character.
metaDesign.characterImagePromptCn: 只画一个人物：祁砚舟，39岁男性，夜巡煤气灯修缮官。高大厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、强壮前臂，暖麦色偏深皮肤，厚重长方脸，暖灰褐细长眼，左颧骨淡疤，黑色短硬发带灰蓝挑染，整齐短胡茬。服装：白色贴身T恤扎进高腰雾蓝灰宽腿灯务工装裤，外搭敞开的短款煤灰黑灯务夹克，袖口卷到前臂，胸前小型黄铜线灯务司布章；斜跨灯芯带连接窄工具腰带，挂小扳手和备用灯芯盒；低帮黑灰防滑灯务靴，左手薄检修手套，右手白色腕带，短链黄铜灯钥。手持黄铜检修灯和折叠灯杆钩。幻想锚点只在检修灯灯芯和胸前布章上有少量暖白低光，不能强发光。材质是干净动画色块、概括褶皱、简化黄铜点缀，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或摄影质感。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到脚完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，不能有渐变、纹理、地面、影子、文字或其他角色。

metaDesign.characterImagePrompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime-style character illustration of Wen Duheng, a 36-year-old tidal seal surveyor from a modern harbor city. Props: an unfolding tide-ruler compass and a short measuring staff, clearly readable as survey tools. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained cyan-white low-glow calibration marks on the compass and trouser-side ruler marks, compact and tidy, not a strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small brass accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere on the character.
